booking_conversion_rate.label: Booking conversion rate
booking_conversion_rate.benchmark_meaning: Direct-booking sites average 2.4% in EU hotels (Adara 2024)

average_booking_value.label: Average booking value (ABV)
average_booking_value.notes: Includes room + ancillaries (F&B, spa, airport transfer)

cancellation_probability.label: Cancellation risk
cancellation_probability.notes: Predicted likelihood guest cancels before arrival

direct_vs_ota_preference.label: Direct vs OTA lean
direct_vs_ota_preference.notes: % of agents who would book direct vs defect to OTA

predicted_nps.label: Predicted Net Promoter Score
predicted_nps.notes: Probability-weighted prediction from simulated post-stay agent sentiment

complaint_probability.label: Complaint probability
complaint_probability.notes: Likelihood a guest raises a formal complaint on-stay

mobile_vs_desktop_conversion.label: Mobile conversion gap
mobile_vs_desktop_conversion.benchmark_meaning: Mobile converts ~42% of desktop rate in hospitality; anything closer to 1.0 is competitive

abandoned_stages.label: Booking flow stages where agents bailed

booking_conversion_1pct_improvement.description: 1 percentage point of conversion improvement at scale
booking_conversion_1pct_improvement.example: For a brand with 2M annual room nights and €165 ABV, +1pp conversion = €3.3M annual revenue

cancellation_1pct_reduction.description: 1 percentage point lower cancellation = captured revenue

ancillary_attach_5pp_improvement.description: Additional 5pp of ancillary attach at €40 avg add-on
